name: Delicious Dirt-Sugar Free
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the sugar-free Devil's food cake according to package directions and allow it to cool completely.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the low-fat cream cheese (or Neufchatel), margarine, skim milk and pudding packets until smooth and well combined.
3. Stir in the prepared sugar-free whipped topping until incorporated.
4. Fold in the crushed sugar-free dark chocolate cookies until evenly distributed throughout.
Enjoy your delicious, sugar-free dessert!
